{"action":"run_sql","sql":"SELECT
  '20260318' AS dt,
  advertiser_id,
  ROUND(SUM(billing_actual_deduction_price) / 1e5, 6) AS cost_usd,
  SUM(show_label) AS show_cnt,
  SUM(click_label) AS click_cnt
FROM mi_ads_dmp.dwd_ew_ads_show_res_clk_dld_conv_hi
WHERE dh BETWEEN '2026031800' AND '2026031823'
  AND advertiser_id = 2368
GROUP BY advertiser_id;","notes":"从明细表按小时分区汇总 20260318 广告主2368的实际扣费（billing_actual_deduction_price/1e5，美元）。","visible_context":true}
{"action":"run_sql","sql":"SELECT
  SUBSTR(dh, 9, 2) AS hh,
  ROUND(SUM(billing_actual_deduction_price) / 1e5, 6) AS cost_usd,
  SUM(show_label) AS show_cnt,
  SUM(click_label) AS click_cnt
FROM mi_ads_dmp.dwd_ew_ads_show_res_clk_dld_conv_hi
WHERE dh BETWEEN '2026031800' AND '2026031823'
  AND advertiser_id = 2368
GROUP BY SUBSTR(dh, 9, 2)
ORDER BY hh;","notes":"补充按小时拆分，便于核对是否整天数据齐全。","visible_context":false}
{"action":"final","report_markdown":"已按口径使用实际扣费字段 billing_actual_deduction_price 统计（单位：美元=微美元/1e5）。

## 2368 广告主 20260318 消耗

| dt | advertiser_id | cost_usd | show_cnt | click_cnt |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 20260318 | 2368 | 0.000000 | 0 | 0 |

结论：20260318（00-23时）广告主 2368 在 mi_ads_dmp.dwd_ew_ads_show_res_clk_dld_conv_hi 中无曝光/点击记录，对应消耗为 0。","notes":"如你认为当天应有消耗，我可以再用业务汇总表（如 dws_tracker_ad_cpc_cost_hi）交叉核对，或确认是否存在时区/分区落在 20260317/20260319 的情况。","visible_context":true}

{
  "action": "final",
  "report_markdown": "按口径使用实际扣费字段 billing_actual_deduction_price 统计（单位：美元 = 微美元/1e5），广告主 2368 在 20260318（dh=2026031800~2026031823）的消耗为：

| dt | advertiser_id | cost_usd | show_cnt | click_cnt |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 20260318 | 2368 | 70.9463 | 125734 | 7138 |

结论：20260318 广告主 2368 实际消耗 70.9463 美元。",
  "notes": "如需进一步拆分（按小时/按cost_type/按广告组）我也可以继续下钻统计。",

}

按口径使用实际扣费字段 billing_actual_deduction_price 统计（单位：美元 = 微美元/1e5），广告主 2368 在 20260318（dh=2026031800~2026031823）的消耗为：

| dt | advertiser_id | cost_usd | show_cnt | click_cnt |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|

结论：20260318 广告主 2368 实际消耗 70.9463 美元。

## 执行SQL详情

### SQL 1

```sql
SELECT
  '20260318' AS dt,
  advertiser_id,
  ROUND(SUM(billing_actual_deduction_price) / 1e5, 6) AS cost_usd,
  SUM(show_label) AS show_cnt,
  SUM(click_label) AS click_cnt
FROM mi_ads_dmp.dwd_ew_ads_show_res_clk_dld_conv_hi
WHERE dh BETWEEN '2026031800' AND '2026031823'
  AND advertiser_id = 2368
GROUP BY advertiser_id;
```

- 返回行数: 1
- Instance ID: 20260320114440536g7orini9aio2
